preview_text:
The model backs Morocco as the clear favorite, assigning them a 63% win probability, while Scotland's chances sit at 12%. The gap reflects a substantial disparity in the model's view of the matchup.

The draw emerges as a plausible outcome at 25%, yet Morocco's advantage is pronounced. Scotland's path to victory is narrow; the model expects Morocco to control the game in a likely lopsided contest rather than a tightly contested affair.

The model and sportsbooks diverge meaningfully here. Books award Scotland nearly double the model's win probability and give the draw a higher chance, while trimming Morocco's win probability to 45%. This 18-percentage-point gap on Morocco's outcome is material. The dashboard does not adjudicate between these views, but the divergence flags a notable disagreement over Scotland's competitive standing in this fixture.
